title: gonolobus hastulatus
intro: Gonolobus hastulatus, also known as the "Yellow Mandevilla", is a tropical vine plant native to Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits associated with Gonolobus hastulatus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide antioxidant effects. Gonolobus hastulatus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are traditionally used to treat various health conditions.
